evals.prompt: We need to run a comprehensive audit of all our skills to check compliance before our quarterly review. Can you orchestrate a full 10-agent audit of the entire SDLC ecosystem and give me an executive dashboard of results?
evals.expected_output: Executive dashboard showing overall compliance scores, detailed breakdown by categories, progress tracking through 10 parallel agents, and prioritized remediation roadmap. Should include workspace setup, agent coordination, and final consolidated reports.

evals.prompt: audit all skills for compliance using parallel agents - I need the results for our governance review meeting tomorrow
evals.expected_output: Complete multi-agent audit execution with progress monitoring, final compliance matrix CSV, technical findings report, and executive summary suitable for governance presentation.

evals.prompt: run ecosystem health check with 10 agents and show me which skills are failing our standards
evals.expected_output: Health check execution with agent coordination, real-time progress dashboard, identification of critical/failing skills, and specific remediation recommendations for non-compliant skills.
